name: Amanda Nunes
oneLiner: The women’s UFC GOAT case: two-division champion, huge title-fight volume, legendary finishes, and the deepest women’s win list in this ranking.
compareShortCase: Nunes is the women's GOAT standard: two-division champion, massive title-fight volume, legendary finishes, and wins over nearly every major name from her era.
compareCounter: The only real argument against Nunes is the Pena upset and the fact that women's featherweight depth was thin. It matters, but it does not erase the whole case.
